item.title: CRWD Stock Tumbles In Cybersecurity Rout — What Is Wall Street Saying?
item.description: Stifel lowered its price target on CrowdStrike to $480 from $600 and kept a ‘Buy’ rating on the shares.

item.title: Alphabet’s Waymo Breaches Fresh Milestone: Self-Driving Fleet Covers 200M Miles
item.description: The company announced the milestone in a post on social media platform X.
